name: Phelesmon
description: A Fallen Angel Digimon shaped like an aristocrat. In exchange for granting someone their desires, it is said that it will snatch away their soul. It is said that it is a Boogiemon that advanced and evolved, but the details are still uncertain. Its Signature Move is changing the opponent into a black stone statue ( Black Statue ). Its Special Move is driving the enemy to insanity with a curse-filled shout ( Demon's Shout ).
